name: Clockwork Queen
title: Matriarch of the Machine

abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Creative Salvage
abilities.text: After this model kills a model, it may make a Scheme or Remains marker within 1" of the killed model.

abilities.name: Improvised Tech
abilities.text: This model's Impact tokens increase damage by +2, instead of +1.

actions.name: Clockwork Gauntlets
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.

triggers.name: Broken Spring
triggers.text: Once per activation. This model deals 1 irreducible damage to itself. Declare this action again.

actions.name: Shattered Crystal
actions.effects: The target and enemies within (pulse)2" of it gain a Staggered token.

triggers.name: Coordinated Attack
triggers.text: Another friendly model may declare a (melee) action targeting the same model.

triggers.name: Dismember
triggers.text: Make a Remains marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Voltaic Blast
actions.effects: Make a Remains marker within range. All enemies within (pulse)2" of the marker must pass a TN 12 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: "It Works in Reverse!"
triggers.text: Friendly models within (pulse)2" of the marker heal 2.

triggers.name: Arm Up
triggers.text: A friendly model within 2" of the made marker gains an Impact token.

extraction_notes: The 'Arm Up' trigger has no suit icon shown before it, which is unusual. It appears to be a book/square icon which typically indicates a general ability. Recording as no suit required.
